title: CodexGoalIterationReport
description: Codex's self-report for one iteration of the verifier-led goal loop. NOTE: self_assessed_status is advisory only — the loop's authoritative decision is made by declarative verifier commands (helper-run) plus Claude's review. Schema enforces shape so the helper can parse, not truth.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what was done this iteration.

self_assessed_status.description: Codex's self-assessment. 'complete' = Codex believes verifiable_end_state is met. 'in_progress' = work done, more iters expected. 'blocked' = cannot proceed without external input. Authoritative status comes from verifiers, not this field.

blocker.description: If status != 'complete': what is preventing further progress this iteration. null when status='complete'.

files_changed.description: Paths of files modified this iteration.

committed.description: Whether Codex committed the changes this iteration. Helper verifies via git log — discrepancy = warning.

commit_sha.description: Short SHA of the iteration's commit. null if committed=false.
